title: tithymalus calendulifolius
intro: Tithymalus calendulifolius, also known as the Spurge Euphorbia, is a plant species native to Africa, characterized by its milky sap and yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Tithymalus calendulifolius include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate joint pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
